name: Lemon Curd Filling
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces unsalted butter (6 tablespoons), chilled and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart heavy-bottomed saucepan, whisk together the eggs, egg yolks, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest.
2. Gradually add the butter pieces to the mixture and place the saucepan over medium heat.
3. Stir constantly until the bottom of the pan is heated through.
4. Cook, stirring continuously, until the mixture thickens and develops body but does not boil.
5. Remove from heat and pour through a stainless steel sieve into a bowl.
6. Cover the surface with plastic wrap, making small slits to allow steam to escape while cooling.
7. Refrigerate until the curd has thickened.
